definition:
περι-έχω, 
 [in LXX for H661, H5362 hi., H6822 pi., etc. ;] 
  1. to surround, encompass: Luk.5:9 (cf. MM, xix). 
   2. to comprehend, include, contain, esp. of books: with accusative, Act.23:25, Rec.; accusative to a late usage, intrans. (BL, § 53, 1.3; MM, xix; Hort, in l), it stands written, 1Pe.2:6.†
 (AS)
